subject: allegheny - patty clark's fax for bcc on westinghouse letter

emails.subject: Allegheny - Patty Clark's Fax for bcc on Westinghouse letter
emails.subject_base: Allegheny - Patty Clark's Fax for bcc on Westinghouse letter
emails.body: Please prepare a bcc on the Siemens letter as indicated below. Forwarded by Kay Mann/Corp/Enron on 05/18/2001 02:00 PM From: Kathleen Carnahan 05/18/2001 01:49 PM

emails.subject: Re: Allegheny - Patty Clark's Fax for bcc on Westinghouse letter
emails.subject_base: Allegheny - Patty Clark's Fax for bcc on Westinghouse letter
emails.body: Re: Allegheny Patty Clark's Fax for bcc on Westinghouse letter I set it up in your letter file under Westhinghouse 2. I didn't know who was going to sign it. I've got the Fed Ex. done and will bring it to you. Kay Mann@ENRON 05/18/2001 02:01 PM
